summary: Code Quality Refactoring Testing (Iteration 59) - Verified that backend and frontend work correctly after code quality fixes. Backend: 7/8 tests passed (1 timeout, not a code issue). Extracted components (SignalStackPanel.jsx, AutoTradingPanel.jsx) exist and are properly imported. ESLint: 0 errors. Ruff (Python): 0 errors.
